summary: Implemented payment overdue UX: hide contract/pay buttons when deadline passed or FORFEITED; show deposit-forfeit message. Dashboard awaiting-payment excludes overdue items; forfeited wins shown in red on dashboard and won-items page. Backend getWonItems returns forfeited status; forfeit notifies winner. Deposit-to-admin on forfeit already existed in AuctionSettlementServiceImpl.
current_status: Payment deadline flow complete on frontend and backend. User sees overdue state immediately when countdown hits zero; scheduler marks FORFEITED and moves deposit to admin wallet within ~5 minutes.
